song_details.name: Vande Vasudevam
song_details.arohanam: S R2 M₁ P N₂ Ṡ ||
song_details.avarohanam: Ṡ N₂ P M₁ R2 G2 R2 S ||

content.swara: vandE vAsudEvam brundArakAdheeSa vandita padAbjam ||
vandE vAsudEvam brundArakAdheeSa vandita padAbjam ||
kandarpa janakamaravinda nAbham ||
nnaga rAja SAyinam ghana nivAsam ||
tiru venkaTAchala dEvam bhajE ||
content.sahitya: P: I bow to Vasudeva. The king (AdheeSa) of Brindaraka worships (vandita) his lotus feet (pada-Abjam).

content.swara: kandarpa janakamaravinda nAbham ||
tiru venkaTAchala dEvam bhajE ||
